suggestions.title: AI Suggestions
suggestions.socialProof: Students who improved this area scored {{percent}}% higher

page.title: AI Tutor
page.newConversationSubtitle: Choose a tutoring style that works best for you
page.personaHint: You can change the persona at any time during the conversation

unavailable.title: AI Tutor unavailable
unavailable.message: The tutor can't be reached right now. Please try again in a few minutes.

notEnrolled.title: Not enrolled in this course
notEnrolled.message: You're not enrolled in this course yet, so the tutor can't help here. Check with your teacher about enrollment.

noEmbeddings.title: Still learning this course
noEmbeddings.message: The tutor hasn't finished studying this course's materials yet. Please check back soon.

rateLimited.title: Daily limit reached
rateLimited.message: You've reached your tutor message limit for today. It resets at midnight.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.message: The AI Tutor ran into a problem. Please try again.

chat.title: AI Tutor
chat.emptyTitle: How can I help you today?
chat.emptyBody: Ask me about your course materials, assignments, or any concept you need help understanding.
chat.limitReached: You've reached your daily message limit. It resets at midnight.
chat.tokenBudgetExceeded: Your daily token budget has been exceeded. Please try again tomorrow.

errors.imageType: {{name}}: Only JPG and PNG images are supported
errors.docType: Only PDF and DOCX documents are supported
errors.uploadFailed: Failed to upload attachment. Please try again.

sidebar.noConversationsHint: Start a new conversation to get help
sidebar.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete this conversation and all its messages. This action cannot be undone.

socratic_guide.label: Socratic Guide
socratic_guide.description: Asks probing questions to lead you to the answer

step_by_step_coach.label: Step-by-Step Coach
step_by_step_coach.description: Breaks down problems into sequential steps
